rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MICHAEL COOMBS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Reconsider The Court'S Jun 9, 14 "Order Re: Receiver'S Mtn For Writ Of Possession";
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 5, 2014, line 2. PETITIONERs MICHAEL COOMBS and TAMARA WOODS' Motion To Reconsider The Court's Jun 9, 2014 "Order Re: Receiver's Motion For Writ Of Possession" Moot. Receiver's Motion for Writ of Possession is granted. Receiver has authority to sell the property. Respondent interferes with Receiver's efforts to enforce the judgment and to sell the property. In light of respondent's non-cooperation no lesser means are feasible for receiver to be able to sell the property. Receiver to prepare form of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELLEN TSANG VS. CHARLES ENGELBERG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 5, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT CHARLES ENGELBERG's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Denied in part and granted in part. Discretionary relief under CCP 473(b) is denied. Engelberg fails to sustain burden and show mistake, surprise or excusable neglect. Mandatory relief under CCP 473(b) is granted. Defendant shall file answer no later than August 5, 2014. Jennifer Kung Gelini is sanctioned $550 payable to the Court within 30 days. Defendant's counsel prepare order and serve it on parties and Jennifer Kung Gelini. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK ALLEN BARNES VS. SHIRLEY HOLMES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 5, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANT SHIRLEY HOLMES's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts supporting conclusion of "substandard" and "defective" conditions requiring repairs. (Causes of action 2-9; 14). Demurrer is overruled as to the causes of action 7-9, 13 notwithstanding the illegal subject of the contract, tenant may enforce contractual implied warranties and covenants. Demurrer to 12th cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts in support of each element of this cause of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALEX KAMINSKY VS. CHRISTOPHER LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 5, 2014, line 12. DEFENDANTs CHRISTOPHER LEE, JENNY LOOPER and SANDRA TILL's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. "3 Day Notice" is fatally defective as it fails to comply with a mandatory requirement of the Rent Ordinance 37.9(c). A valid notice is an element of unlawful detainer cause of action and it has not been alleged here. Plaintiff's counsel should refrain from citing unpublished/noncitable cases. Moving party and its counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/REQ)
